description: Introducing the 1000ML Air Tight Glass Food Container With Bamboo Lid - Keep Your Food Fresh and Stylish Are you in need of a reliable and stylish food container for your home? Look no further than our 1000ML Air Tight Glass Food Container. Designed with both functionality and aesthetics in mind, this container is a must-have for any kitchen. Key Features: Air Tight Seal: The container features an air-tight seal provided by the bamboo lid, ensuring that your food stays fresh and free from moisture. This seal also helps to preserve the flavors and textures of your favorite ingredients and dishes. Stylish and Versatile: With its clear glass and sleek bamboo lid, this food container brings a touch of sophistication to your kitchen. It seamlessly blends into any home decor style and is suitable for storing a wide range of food items, including leftovers, snacks, dry goods, and more. Perfect Size: The container has a generous capacity of 1000ML, providing ample space for your food storage needs. Whether you're storing a family-sized meal or portioning out individual servings, this container has you covered. Easy to Clean: Both the glass container and bamboo lid are easy to clean, allowing for hassle-free maintenance. Simply hand wash them with mild soap and water, and they'll be ready for reuse. Product Specifications: Container Type: Air Tight Glass Food Container Capacity: 1000ML Material: Glass container, Bamboo lid Color: Clear Size: 6.4cm (height) x 14.9cm (width) x 20cm (length) Upgrade your food storage game with the 1000ML Air Tight Glass Food Container With Bamboo Lid. Experience the convenience of an air-tight seal, the elegance of bamboo, and the durability of glass.
